In addition, by practicing this valuable merit, we can enlarge our knowledge reserve, which in turn enables us to view complex problems from various perspectives.
translation:
Last but not least, it is interdisciplinary learning that offers infinite opportunities for our life, leading us out of the impasse to a shining future.
